title: schefflera metcalfiana var. langbianensis
intro: Schefflera metcalfiana var. langbianensis is a plant species within the Araliaceae family, commonly known as the Umbrella Tree due to its distinctive umbrella-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Vietnamese folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schefflera metcalfiana var. langbianensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
